title: campanula glomerata var. cervicaria
intro: Campanula glomerata var. cervicaria, also known as the clustered bellflower or bellflower, is a perennial plant species within the campanula genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. Campanula glomerata var. cervicaria can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
